title: HD-map validation and change detection for ADAS/AV
summary: Satellite land cover change detection targets re-survey effort for HD maps used by driver-assistance systems.
problem: HD maps underpinning advanced driver-assistance and autonomous systems degrade as the roadside environment changes. Calendar-based re-survey is inefficient — surveying unchanged areas while missing significant changes that cause sensor-fusion errors.
solution: Annual CLMS High Resolution Layers and Sentinel-2 change detection flag land-cover change along road corridors. Change alerts trigger targeted re-survey assignments, focusing mobile-mapping effort where the environment has actually changed.

copernicusRole.detail: CLMS layers and Sentinel-2 change detection flag where to re-survey; the HD map itself is built from mobile mapping. Copernicus acts as a change-trigger within a larger mapping workflow.
